layer1.mission: Keep a typical repository aligned to current operational truth.

items: Owns the default framework teaching surfaces.

activeRisks: A clean narrative can outrun repository evidence.
nonGoals: Do not publish a live local genesis.md file.

changes: Add a repository validation workflow and fixtures.
ledger.nextStep: Use the same validator in CI and before releases.

readFirst: Start with the strongest repo reality anchors.
workingRules: Do not treat validation success as semantic proof.
updateProtocol: Update the ledger after meaningful repository work.
